links.targetTitle: Powerhouse documents are stored as an append-only operation log, not state snapshots
Powerhouse documents are stored as an append-only operation log, not state snapshots
The Inspector Modal exposes the local PGlite database and sync remote channel states (inbox, outbox, dead letter) for debugging

global.title: Each reactor IChannel exposes three mailboxes: inbox, outbox, and deadLetter.
global.description: The reactor sync protocol standardizes every channel to have inbox for pulls, outbox for pushes, and deadLetter for failed ops, plus init/shutdown lifecycle.
